name: is_bit_set_not0_no_bound

name: or_bit_set_no_bound
reason: The OR biconditional axiom has no `j < 64` guard — for out-of-range positions where `1usize << j` wraps, this produces conclusions about wrapped bit operations that don't correspond to real bit semantics
